title: Amtech K0425 Combination Spanner Set, 11 Pieces Chrome Plated, Corrosion Resistant, Supplied with Storage Rack, 6mm-19mm
features: DURABLE: This 11 piece combination spanner set is made from strong, drop forged, chrome plated steel with polished heads for corrosion resistance
POPULAR SIZES: The set includes popular sizes between 6mm - 19mm and comes in a handy storage rack
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description The Amtech Combination Spanner Set is a must have for any PRO mechanic or keen DIY enthusiast that likes great value and durability. This 11-piece set is supplied complete with a convenient storage rack and a variety of sizes and it is manufactured to last, using chrome plated steel. Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hand tools requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
